rules.title: Tournament Rules
rules.subtitle: Please read all rules carefully before registering

fairPlay.title: Fair Play
rules: No hacking, cheating, or using third-party software
No teaming with other squads outside your registered team
All players must use their registered Free Fire UID
Respect all opponents and tournament officials

squad.title: Squad Requirements
rules: One squad per team — duplicate UIDs will be disqualified
Players cannot be on multiple squads in the same tournament
Squad leader is responsible for team conduct

match.title: Match Rules
rules: Join the room within 5 minutes of the room ID announcement
Squads not joining on time will be disqualified
Room ID and password will be posted in the tournament dashboard
Follow all in-game tournament settings as specified by admin

disqualification.title: Disqualification
rules: Using any form of cheating software results in immediate disqualification
Abusive language or harassment will result in a ban
Intentional disconnection to avoid elimination is not allowed
Admin decisions are final in all disputes
